name: Simple time query (test-file format)
description: The `.test.json` single-file format, run with `adk test tests/eval/data`. Same `EvalSet`/`EvalCase` schema as the `.evalset.json` files; the convention is one focused case per file for fast, unit-style checks. Criteria come from the adjacent `test_config.json`.

parts.text: What is the current time in the America/New_York timezone?
Here is the current time in the America/New_York timezone.
